new_javadoc:
/** * Converts an Instant to milliseconds bound to a {@code long} without throwing {@link ArithmeticException}. *
    *
  • If the duration milliseconds are greater than {@link Long#MAX_VALUE}, then return {@link Long#MAX_VALUE}.
    • *
  • If the duration milliseconds are lesser than {@link Long#MIN_VALUE}, then return {@link Long#MIN_VALUE}.
    • *
* * @param instant The instant to convert, not null. * @return long milliseconds. * @see Instant#toEpochMilli() * @see Long#MIN_VALUE * @see Long#MAX_VALUE */
patch:
diff --git a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/time/Instants.java b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/time/Instants.java --- a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/time/Instants.java +++ b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/time/Instants.java @@ -0,0 +26,23 @@ + */ +public class Instants { + + /** + * Converts an Instant to milliseconds bound to a {@code long} without throwing {@link ArithmeticException}. + *
    + *
  • If the duration milliseconds are greater than {@link Long#MAX_VALUE}, then return {@link Long#MAX_VALUE}.
    • + *
  • If the duration milliseconds are lesser than {@link Long#MIN_VALUE}, then return {@link Long#MIN_VALUE}.
    • + *
+ * + * @param instant The instant to convert, not null. + * @return long milliseconds. + * @see Instant#toEpochMilli() + * @see Long#MIN_VALUE + * @see Long#MAX_VALUE + */ + public static long toEpochMillis(final Instant instant) { + try { + return instant.toEpochMilli(); + } catch (final ArithmeticException e) { + return instant.getEpochSecond() < 0 ? Long.MIN_VALUE : Long.MAX_VALUE; + } + }
